project_area: Health and wellness initiatives, dismantling barriers to health/safety/wellness, programs/events benefiting Maryland communities
demographic_requirements: Programs must benefit communities in Maryland, with priority given to initiatives addressing health equity, diversity, and inclusion
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofit organizations and 501(c)(3) public charities serving Maryland communities. Health-focused missions are prioritized, but non-health organizations (e.g., cultural, civic, educational) may apply if proposals align with UMMS Community Impact Grant Guidelines.
